name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial support of ₹6000 per year to small and marginal farmer families having combined land holding up to 2 hectares.
amount: ₹6000/year (₹2000 every 4 months)
eligibility: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land, subject to certain exclusion criteria (e.g., institutional landholders, income tax payers).
documents_needed: Aadhar Card, Bank Account, Land Records (Khasra/Khatauni)
apply_where: PM Kisan portal online or nearest CSC center
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
search_text: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi farmer financial support 6000 rupees agriculture

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage arising out of unforeseen events.
amount: As per crop loss and premium
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops in the notified areas.
documents_needed: Aadhar Card, Bank Account, Land Records, Sowing Certificate
apply_where: Banks, CSC, or PMFBY Portal
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
search_text: PM Fasal Bima Yojana PMFBY farmer crop insurance agriculture

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides free soil testing for farmers to help them understand the nutrient status of their land and improve yields.
amount: Free soil testing and report
eligibility: All farmers are eligible to receive the soil health card for their farm holdings.
documents_needed: Aadhar Card, Land details, Passport-sized Photograph
apply_where: Agriculture Department / Soil Testing Labs
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
search_text: Soil Health Card Scheme farmer free soil testing agriculture

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Provides adequate and timely credit support from the banking system to farmers for their cultivation and other needs.
amount: Credit up to ₹5 lakh at 7% interest (effective 4% on prompt repayment); limit raised from ₹3 lakh in Union Budget 2025-26
eligibility: All farmers, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, and self-help groups (SHGs) involved in agriculture and allied activities.
documents_needed: Aadhar/Driving License/PAN, Land Records, Passport Photo
apply_where: Any Co-operative Bank, Regional Rural Bank, or Commercial Bank
search_text: Kisan Credit Card KCC farmer loan 3 lakh agriculture

name: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana
description: Aims to enhance physical access of water on farm and expand cultivable area under assured irrigation.
amount: Subsidy for irrigation equipment (up to 55% for small farmers)
eligibility: Farmers with cultivable land. Water User Associations, cooperative societies, and farmer producer organizations also eligible.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Land Records, caste certificate, Bank details
apply_where: State Agriculture Department
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
search_text: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana farmer irrigation water subsidy agriculture

name: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao
description: A joint initiative to address the declining Child Sex Ratio and promote girls' education and welfare.
amount: Varies by state interventions
eligibility: Families with a girl child, primarily focused on districts with a low Child Sex Ratio.
documents_needed: Birth Certificate, Aadhar of parents,Photograph,identity proof
apply_where: Anganwadi Centres, Banks, Post Offices
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
search_text: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao women girl child welfare education

name: PM Ujjwala Yojana
description: Provides free LPG connections to women from Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.
amount: Free LPG connection (₹1600 deposit free)
eligibility: Adult women belonging to BPL households, SC/ST, PMAY (Gramin), AAY, or Most Backward Classes without an existing LPG connection.
documents_needed: BPL Ration Card, Aadhar Card, Bank Account, KYC
apply_where: Nearest LPG Distributor
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
search_text: PM Ujjwala Yojana women BPL free LPG gas cylinder

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Maternity benefit program providing partial compensation for wage loss in the form of cash incentives so that a woman can take adequate rest before and after delivery.
amount: ₹5000 in 3 installments
eligibility: Pregnant Women and Lactating Mothers for their first living child, aged 19+, excluding those in regular employment with Central/State Govt or PSUs.
documents_needed: Aadhar Card, MCP Card, Bank Account
apply_where: Anganwadi Centre / ASHA worker
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
search_text: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana women maternity pregnant 5000

name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin) - PMAY-G
description: Aims to provide a pucca house with basic amenities to all houseless households living in kutcha and dilapidated houses in rural areas.
amount: ₹1.20 lakh plains / ₹1.30 lakh hilly areas
eligibility: Houseless families and those living in zero, one or two room houses with kutcha roof as per SECC 2011 data.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Bank Account, Job Card (MGNREGA), Swachh Bharat Mission number
apply_where: Gram Panchayat
search_text: PM Awas Yojana Gramin housing rural home construction

name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: World's largest health insurance scheme fully financed by the government, covering bottom 40% of families for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
amount: ₹5 lakh health coverage per family/year
eligibility: Families listed in the SECC 2011 database under targeted deprivation categories (bottom 40% of the population) Additionally, ALL senior citizens aged 70+ are eligible irrespective of income (Ayushman Vay Vandana, expanded Oct 2024). ASHAs, AWWs, AWHs and their families also covered.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Ration Card, PM-JAY e-card
apply_where: Empaneled Hospitals or CSC
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
search_text: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY health insurance 5 lakh medical

name: PM Mudra Loan (Shishu/Kishore/Tarun)
description: Provides collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Shishu: up to ₹50,000; Kishore: ₹50,001–₹5 lakh; Tarun: ₹5–10 lakh.
amount: Loans up to ₹10 lakh (collateral-free)
eligibility: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for a non-farm sector income generating activity (manufacturing, processing, trading, or service sector).
documents_needed: Aadhar, PAN,Proof of category, Business Plan, Bank Statement
apply_where: Commercial Banks, RRBs, Small Finance Banks
search_text: PM Mudra Loan employment business loan 10 lakh startup

name: Skill India – PMKVY
description: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana enables Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training that helps them secure better livelihoods.
amount: Free training + monetary reward (approx ₹8000)
eligibility: Any unemployed youth or school/college dropout aged 15–45 with Aadhar card and a bank account.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Bank Account, Education Certificates
apply_where: PMKVY Training Centres
ministry: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
search_text: Skill India PMKVY youth employment training free

name: PM Rozgar Protsahan Yojana (PMRPY)
description: Incentivizes employers for generating new employment, where the Government pays the full employer's EPF and EPS contribution for new hires.
amount: Employer's EPF/EPS contribution (8.33% + 3.67%) paid by Government
eligibility: EPFO-registered establishments. New employees must have a fresh UAN and earn less than ₹15,000/month.
documents_needed: Aadhar, UAN, EPF details
apply_where: NA
search_text: PM Rozgar Protsahan Yojana employment EPF EPS jobs

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension (IGNOAPS)
description: Provides financial assistance to elderly persons living below the poverty line.
amount: ₹200–500/month pension
eligibility: Applicants must be 60 years or older and belong to a BPL household.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Age Proof, BPL Card, Bank Account
apply_where: Gram Panchayat / Municipal Office
search_text: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension elderly senior citizen NSAP

name: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: One-year renewable life insurance scheme offering coverage of ₹2 lakh for death due to any reason at a low annual premium.
amount: ₹2 lakh life cover at ₹436/year
eligibility: People aged 18–50 with a savings bank or post office account who consent to auto-debit. Coverage continues until age 55 for those already enrolled before turning 50.
documents_needed: Aadhar,Nominee details,Caste Certificate,Bank Account (auto-debit)
apply_where: Participating Banks / Post Office
search_text: PM Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana insurance life cover 2 lakh

name: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accidental death and disability insurance scheme at a very low annual premium of ₹20/year.
amount: ₹2 lakh on accidental death / ₹1 lakh on partial disability
eligibility: People aged 18–70 with a savings bank or post office account who give consent for auto-debit.
documents_needed: Aadhar,Mobile Number,Bank Account
apply_where: Participating Banks / Post Office / CSC
search_text: PM Suraksha Bima Yojana accident insurance disability 2 lakh 20 rupees

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Government-backed pension scheme for unorganised sector workers guaranteeing a monthly pension of ₹1000–₹5000 at age 60.
amount: ₹1000–₹5000/month pension after age 60
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18–40 with a savings bank account not covered under any statutory social security scheme.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Bank Account, Mobile Number
apply_where: Bank branches, Post Offices, or online
search_text: Atal Pension Yojana APY pension 1000 5000 retirement unorganised

name: MGNREGA – Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
amount: 100 days of wage employment/year (₹272-₹400/day as per state)
eligibility: Any adult member of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual work. Applicant must have a Job Card.
documents_needed: Aadhar,Voter Card,Photograph,Ration Card,Job Card (MGNREGA), Bank Account
apply_where: Gram Panchayat Office
search_text: MGNREGA NREGA 100 days employment job rural labour wage

name: National Food Security Act – Subsidised Ration
description: Provides subsidised food grains (rice/wheat) at ₹1–3/kg to beneficiaries under Priority Household and AAY categories.
amount: 5 kg grain/person/month at ₹1–3/kg
eligibility: Households covered under Priority Household (PHH) or Antyodaya Anna Yojana (AAY) category with a ration card.
documents_needed: Ration Card,Income Proof,Photograph, Aadhar (linked with ration card)
apply_where: Fair Price Shop (Ration Shop)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
search_text: Ration card subsidised food grain rice wheat cheap BPL NFSA

name: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Financial inclusion scheme providing zero-balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card, overdraft facility up to ₹10,000, and accident insurance.
amount: Zero-balance account + ₹2 lakh accident cover + ₹10,000 overdraft
eligibility: Any Indian citizen (10+) without an existing bank account.
documents_needed: Aadhar Card / Voter ID / any government identity proof
apply_where: Any nationalised bank, RRB, or post office
search_text: PM Jan Dhan Yojana zero balance bank account RuPay financial inclusion

name: PM Garib Kalyan Anna Yojana (PMGKAY)
description: Provides 5 kg free food grain per person per month to all National Food Security Act beneficiaries, over and above their subsidised ration entitlement.
amount: 5 kg free food grain/person/month
eligibility: All NFSA ration card holders (PHH and AAY).
documents_needed: Ration Card, Aadhar
apply_where: Fair Price Shop (Ration Shop)
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
search_text: PMGKAY free ration free food grain wheat rice poor

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
description: Small savings investment scheme for the girl child, offering high interest rates (currently 8.2% p.a.) and tax benefits under Section 80C.
amount: Savings scheme: deposit ₹250–₹1.5 lakh/year; maturity amount depends on deposits
eligibility: Parents/guardians of a girl child below 10 years of age (up to 2 girls per family).
documents_needed: Girl child's birth certificate, Aadhar of parent/guardian
apply_where: Post Office / Authorised Banks
search_text: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana girl savings 8.2% tax benefit education marriage

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) Scholarships
description: Single-window platform for Central Government scholarships including CSSS (merit), Top Class Education for SC/ST (full fee + allowances at premier institutions like IITs/NITs/IIITs), Post-Matric for Minorities/OBC, and PwD scholarships. Amount varies widely by scheme, category, and institution.
amount: ₹7,000–₹20,000/year (general/minority); Up to ₹2.5 lakh+/year for SC/ST Top Class students at central institutions (full tuition + ₹86,000 allowance in Year 1)
eligibility: SC/ST/OBC/Minority/Disabled/General (EWS) students in recognised institutions. Income limit varies: ₹2.5 lakh (Minority), ₹8 lakh (Top Class SC/ST, CSSS). Must have 80%+ in Class 12 for CSSS; academic/category criteria differ per scheme.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Income Certificate, Caste Certificate, Previous Marksheet, Bank Account, Bonafide/Enrollment Certificate
apply_where: NSP Portal online
search_text: National Scholarship NSP scholarship SC ST OBC minority disabled top class full fee IIT NIT IIIT CSSS merit income

name: PM SVANidhi – Street Vendor Micro-Credit Scheme
description: Provides working capital loans of ₹10,000–₹50,000 to street vendors to resume livelihoods post COVID-19 with incentives for digital transactions.
amount: ₹10,000 (1st loan) → ₹20,000 → ₹50,000 (graduated loans)
eligibility: Street vendors operating in urban areas with a Certificate of Vending or Letter of Recommendation from Town Vending Committee.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Vendor Certificate/LoR, Bank Account
apply_where: Urban Local Body (ULB) or lending institution
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
search_text: PM SVANidhi street vendor micro loan 10000 rehri patri urban

name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana (DDU-GKY)
description: Funds and supports skill training programs that target rural poor youth and provide placement-linked training for wage employment.
amount: Free skill training + placement assistance
eligibility: Rural youth aged 15–35 from poor families (SECC 2011 data). Age relaxed to 45 for women, SC/ST, and PwD.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Income Proof, SECC listing, Educational Certificate
apply_where: State Rural Livelihoods Mission (SRLM) offices
search_text: DDU-GKY Deen Dayal rural youth skill training placement employment

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana – Urban (PMAY-U)
description: Housing for All mission providing interest subsidy on home loans to EWS/LIG/MIG beneficiaries in urban areas.
amount: Interest subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh (EWS/LIG) on home loan
eligibility: EWS (income up to ₹3 lakh), LIG (₹3–6 lakh), MIG-I (₹6–12 lakh), MIG-II (₹12–18 lakh) families without pucca house.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Income Certificate, Self-declaration of no pucca house, Bank Account
apply_where: Common Service Centres, Banks, or State Nodal Agency
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
search_text: PMAY Urban housing interest subsidy EWS LIG MIG home loan

name: National Social Assistance Programme – Widow Pension (IGNWPS)
description: Financial assistance to widows below poverty line under the Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme.
amount: ₹300/month (Centre) + State top-up
eligibility: Widow aged 40–79 from a BPL household.
documents_needed: Aadhar, BPL Card, Husband's Death Certificate, Age Proof, Bank Account
apply_where: Gram Panchayat / Block Office / Municipal Office
search_text: Widow pension IGNWPS NSAP BPL woman financial assistance

name: National Social Assistance Programme – Disability Pension (IGNDPS)
description: Pension for severely disabled persons below the poverty line under Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme.
amount: ₹300/month (Centre) + State top-up
eligibility: Persons aged 18–79 with 80%+ disability from a BPL household.
documents_needed: Aadhar, BPL Card, Disability Certificate (80%+), Bank Account
apply_where: Gram Panchayat / Block Office
search_text: Disability pension IGNDPS NSAP BPL divyang severely disabled

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Comprehensive support to artisans and craftspeople (Vishwakarma) with skill training, toolkits, collateral-free loans, and digital transaction incentives.
amount: ₹15,000 toolkit + loan ₹1 lakh (1st) / ₹2 lakh (2nd) at 5% interest
eligibility: Artisans/craftspeople in 18 designated trades (carpenter, weaver, blacksmith, goldsmith, potter, tailor etc.) aged 18+.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Mobile linked to Aadhar, Bank Account
apply_where: CSC / PM Vishwakarma portal
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
search_text: PM Vishwakarma Yojana artisan craftsman carpenter blacksmith toolkit loan

name: Stand Up India Scheme
description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up greenfield enterprises.
amount: Loan ₹10 lakh – ₹1 crore
eligibility: SC/ST or woman entrepreneur above 18 years. Enterprise must be a greenfield (new) project in manufacturing, services, or trading sector.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PAN, Business Plan, Caste/Gender Certificate, Bank Account
apply_where: Scheduled Commercial Banks
search_text: Stand Up India SC ST women entrepreneur loan 10 lakh 1 crore business

name: Haryana Integrated Horticulture Development Scheme (IHD)
description: Subsidy for farmers to cultivate vegetables, fruits, flowers, spices and aromatic plants in Haryana under the Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture (MIDH). Covers new orchard plantation, vegetable cultivation, spice and flower crops.
amount: ₹24,500–₹1,40,000/acre for new orchards; ₹15,000/acre for vegetable cultivation (integrated model); ₹25,500/acre for SC farmers; ₹15,000–₹30,000/acre for spice cultivation; ₹8,000–₹40,000/acre for flower cultivation; ₹8,000/acre for aromatic plants
eligibility: All Haryana farmers with cultivable land. SC farmers get higher subsidy. Applicable for fruits (guava, lemon, amla, kinnow, etc.), vegetables (tomato, onion, potato, capsicum, etc.), flowers, spices and aromatic crops.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP (Family ID), Land Records (Jamabandi), Bank Account, Passport Photo
apply_where: District Horticulture Office or online Horticulture portal
search_text: Haryana horticulture subsidy tomato onion potato vegetable orchard fruit flower spice plantation farmer

name: Haryana Bhavantar Bharpai Yojana (BBY)
description: Price deficit compensation scheme for vegetable and fruit farmers in Haryana. If market price at mandi falls below the government-fixed protected price, the difference is transferred directly to farmer's bank account. Covers 21 crops including tomato, potato, onion, cauliflower, capsicum, brinjal, carrot, peas, garlic, chilli, ladyfinger, cabbage, radish, turmeric, mango, guava, kinnow, litchi, plum and more.
amount: Compensation = Protected Price minus Actual Mandi Price (per quintal). Protected income ensured: ₹48,000–₹56,000/acre for covered crops. Example: Tomato/Potato protected at ₹400/quintal; Onion/Cauliflower at ₹500/quintal.
eligibility: All Haryana farmers (landowner, lessee or tenant) cultivating any of the 21 notified crops. Must register on Meri Fasal Mera Byora portal before sowing. Must sell produce at HSAMB-notified mandis during scheduled sale period.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Proof of land ownership or lease agreement , Bank Account, Proof of land ownership or lease agreement , Seed/Sowing details, J-Form from mandi at time of sale
apply_where: Register on Meri Fasal Mera Byora portal (fasal.haryana.gov.in) or HSAMB e-portal (ekharid.in)
last_date: Registration open seasonally before sowing; sale must happen in notified period
search_text: Bhavantar Bharpai Yojana BBY price compensation vegetable tomato potato onion farmer mandi Haryana

name: Mera Pani Meri Virasat – Crop Diversification Scheme
description: Incentivises farmers to replace water-intensive paddy with alternate crops including maize, cotton, pulses, oilseeds, vegetables, horticulture crops, fodder crops and agroforestry. Covers all districts except Mahendergarh.
amount: ₹7,000/acre for replacing paddy with low water-intensive crops; ₹4,000/acre for Direct Seeded Rice (DSR); ₹4,000/acre for replacing bajra with other crops in specified districts
eligibility: Haryana farmers who replace paddy with notified alternate crops. Land must be in notified districts. Farmer must be registered on Meri Fasal Mera Byora portal.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP, Bank Account, Proof of crop change
apply_where: Meri Fasal Mera Byora portal or Agriculture Department office
ministry: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Haryana
search_text: Mera Pani Meri Virasat paddy replacement crop diversification 7000 per acre maize cotton Haryana farmer

name: Crop Residue Management (CRM) Scheme – Haryana
description: Central + State scheme to prevent paddy stubble burning by providing subsidised crop residue management machinery to farmers and Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs). Machines include Happy Seeder, Super Seeder, Straw Chopper, Rotavator, Zero-Till Drill, Surface Seeder, Smart Seeder etc.
amount: 50% subsidy on purchase of CRM machinery for individual farmers; 80% subsidy for rural entrepreneurs/FPOs/cooperatives/panchayats setting up Custom Hiring Centres (CHCs) for projects up to ₹30 lakh. Haryana state additionally provides: ₹1,000/acre incentive for managing straw via baling; ₹500/MT additional top-up in IOC Panipat ethanol cluster areas; ₹2,500/MT common determined rate for paddy straw; ₹500/acre transport charges to Gaushalas (max ₹15,000)
eligibility: All Haryana paddy farmers. For CHC: rural entrepreneurs, cooperative societies, FPOs, SHGs, panchayats. Machine should be purchased through Agriculture Department-approved vendors.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP, Land Records, Bank Account, Quotation from approved machinery vendor
apply_where: District Agriculture Department or Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK)
last_date: Apply before Kharif harvest season (September–October annually)
ministry: Department of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Haryana + Ministry of Agriculture (Central Scheme)
search_text: Haryana parali stubble crop residue management paddy straw happy seeder subsidy CRM scheme farmer

name: Haryana Mini Dairy Unit Scheme (2–10 Milch Animals)
description: Subsidised loan scheme for setting up small dairy units of 2 to 10 milch animals (cow or buffalo). 50% subsidy for indigenous/desi cow breeds (Sahiwal, Hariana); 25% subsidy for crossbred cows/buffalo units of 10 animals.
amount: 5-animal unit: 50% subsidy — ₹45,000 for animal purchase + ₹20,000 insurance (3 years); 10-animal unit: 25% subsidy on total unit cost; Shed construction: ₹90,000 included in project cost; Loan up to ₹90,000 per animal via Saral Haryana Portal
eligibility: Haryana resident aged 18–60, interested in dairy farming. Priority for unemployed rural youth, SC/ST/BPL. Must have space/shed for animals. Training in animal husbandry preferred. SC families get 50% subsidy on 3-animal dairy unit.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP, PAN Card, Caste Certificate (if SC/ST/BPL), Income Certificate, Bank Account, Land/Shed proof, Training Certificate (if available), Cancelled cheque
apply_where: Saral Haryana Portal or nearest CSE center
ministry: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Haryana
search_text: Haryana dairy farm subsidy cow buffalo tabela mini dairy loan 50% 25% animal husbandry rural

name: Dairy Entrepreneurship Development Scheme (DEDS) – NABARD/Central
description: Central scheme via NABARD to promote dairy farming as an enterprise. Provides back-ended capital subsidy for setting up dairy units, purchase of milch animals, purchase of equipment and shed construction. Available in Haryana through NABARD-linked banks.
amount: 25% back-ended capital subsidy (33.33% for SC/ST) on project cost up to ₹6 lakh for animal purchase + equipment + shed. Example: 10-animal unit = ~₹10 lakh project; subsidy ~₹2.5 lakh (general) or ₹3.33 lakh (SC/ST)
eligibility: Farmers, individual entrepreneurs, NGOs, companies, cooperatives. No income limit. Must take bank loan for remaining 75% of cost. Not available for those who have availed other central dairy schemes in past 5 years.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PAN, Business Plan/DPR, Bank Loan sanction letter, Land/Shed ownership proof, Caste Certificate (if SC/ST)
apply_where: Any Commercial Bank, RRB or Co-operative Bank linked to NABARD in Haryana
search_text: DEDS dairy entrepreneurship NABARD subsidy 25% cow buffalo animal husbandry Haryana

name: Haryana Pashu Kisan Credit Card (PKCC)
description: Short-term revolving credit card for animal farmers (dairy, poultry, fishery) in Haryana at highly subsidised effective interest rate of 4% (after interest subvention). Covers purchase of cattle, feed, fodder, veterinary expenses.
amount: Loan up to ₹1.60 lakh per cow/buffalo at 7% interest; effective rate 4% after interest subvention on timely repayment
eligibility: Any Haryana resident engaged in animal husbandry — dairy, poultry or fishery. Should have owned animals or shed space.Good CIBIL score.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP, Bank Account, Land/Shed details,Livestock Ownership Proof.
apply_where: District Animal Husbandry Office or any Cooperative/Commercial Bank in Haryana
ministry: Department of Animal Husbandry and Dairying, Haryana
search_text: Haryana Pashu Kisan Credit Card dairy cow buffalo loan 4% interest animal husbandry

name: Mukhyamantri Doodh Uphaar Yojana
description: A state nutrition scheme providing fortified skimmed milk (in 6 flavors) to combat malnutrition and anemia. The milk is enriched with protein, calcium, magnesium, and vitamins A and D3.
amount: 200 ml of fortified milk per day (provided for 300 days a year)
eligibility: Children aged 6 months to 6 years, pregnant women, and lactating mothers who are enrolled at Anganwadi Centres in Haryana.
documents_needed: Aadhar Card, Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP), Anganwadi Enrollment/Registration
apply_where: Nearest Anganwadi Centre
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana Mukhyamantri Doodh Uphaar Yojana milk nutrition pregnant lactating children Anganwadi

name: Haryana Enterprises and Employment Policy (HEEP) 2020 – Interest Subsidy for MSME
description: Interest subsidy on term loans for new Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises in Haryana under HEEP 2020. Higher subsidies for women/SC/ST-led enterprises and businesses in backward blocks (B, C, D category).
amount: 5% interest subsidy for new Micro/Small enterprises in A-category blocks; 6% for women/SC/ST-led Micro Enterprises in B/C/D blocks (up to ₹20 lakh/year); 5% for existing enterprises making 50%+ expansion. Subsidy available for 5 years on term loan.
eligibility: New MSME units that started operations after Jan 1, 2021 and before Dec 31, 2025. Must file Udyam Registration Certificate (URC) and Haryana Udhyam Memorandum (HUM). Should have taken term loan from bank/co-operative/NABARD/commercial bank. Unit must be in active production.
documents_needed: Udyam Registration Certificate, Haryana Udhyam Memorandum (HUM), Bank term loan documents, Business address proof, GST Registration, Aadhar, PAN
apply_where: Directorate of MSME Haryana or District Industries Centre (DIC)
last_date: Scheme valid till December 31, 2025 (check renewal status)
search_text: Haryana MSME interest subsidy HEEP 2020 business loan SC ST women entrepreneur new unit

name: PMEGP – Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
description: Central scheme for setting up new micro enterprises in manufacturing or service sector. Provides margin money subsidy (non-repayable capital grant) via bank loan to first-time entrepreneurs.
amount: 15–35% margin money subsidy on project cost: Urban general: 15%; Rural general: 25%; SC/ST/Women/Ex-servicemen/Minority/PwD/NE urban: 25%; same categories in rural: 35%. Project cost cap: ₹50 lakh (manufacturing), ₹20 lakh (service/trade).
eligibility: Any Indian citizen 18+. For projects above ₹10 lakh (manufacturing) / ₹5 lakh (services), minimum 8th pass. No income limit. Existing businesses not eligible — must be new enterprise. Not eligible if availed benefit under other central subsidy schemes.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PAN, Project Report, Educational Certificate, Caste/Category Certificate, Bank Account
apply_where: DIC office or online PMEGP portal,JanSamarth Platform
ministry: Ministry of MSME (KVIC), Government of India
search_text: PMEGP margin money subsidy new business startup manufacturing service SC ST women employment generation

name: Haryana Gramin Udyogik Vikas Yojana (H-GUVY)
description: Haryana-specific rural enterprise development scheme providing capital subsidy, interest subsidy, and DG set subsidy to spur industrial growth in rural areas.
amount: 15% capital subsidy (up to ₹20L/₹25L for SC/Women); 7% interest subsidy (up to ₹8L/year for 7 years); DG set: ₹8,000/KVA (up to 50% cost)
eligibility: New Micro Enterprises (Investment < ₹1 Cr, Turnover < ₹5 Cr) located in rural areas of B, C, and D category blocks in Haryana. Must have Udyam Registration and Haryana Udhyam Memorandum (HUM).
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP, Business Plan, Land/Shed documents, Bank Account, Udyam Registration, HUM
apply_where: District Industries Centre (DIC) or MSME Directorate Haryana
search_text: Haryana Gramin Udyogik Vikas Yojana rural MSME business subsidy interest capital DG set

name: Haryana Startup Policy 2022 – Seed Grant and Subsidies
description: Haryana state startup incentive policy providing seed grants, patent cost reimbursement, lease rental subsidies, and SGST reimbursement for DPIIT-recognised startups based in Haryana.
amount: Seed grant up to ₹10 lakh; Patent cost reimbursement: 100% up to ₹25 lakh; Lease rental subsidy: 30% (general), 45% (women-founder) up to ₹5 lakh/year; Net SGST reimbursement: 50% for 7 years (capped at 100% of FCI)
eligibility: Startups registered with DPIIT with a Haryana address. Must be incorporated as a company/LLP/registered partnership. Not more than 10 years old from incorporation.
documents_needed: DPIIT recognition certificate, Incorporation certificate, Aadhar, PAN, GST registration, HUM (Haryana Udhyam Memorandum), Business plan
apply_where: Startup Haryana Portal or Department of Industries & Commerce, Haryana
ministry: Department of Industries and Commerce, Haryana
search_text: Haryana startup policy seed grant 10 lakh patent SGST women founder DPIIT recognised

name: Haryana BOCW – Construction Worker Registration & Welfare (HBOCWWB)
description: Umbrella registration for building and construction workers in Haryana under HBOCWWB. Once registered, workers get access to 15+ welfare schemes covering maternity, pension, education, tools, cycle, sewing machine and death/accident benefits.
amount: Access to all HBOCWWB sub-schemes. Registration fee: ₹25 first time; renewal: ₹60/year, ₹120/2 years, ₹180/3 years
eligibility: Workers engaged in building/construction work in Haryana (mason, carpenter, painter, plumber, electrician, welder, road worker etc.) aged 18–60. Must have worked in construction for at least 90 days in the past 12 months. Haryana domicile.
documents_needed: Aadhar, PPP (Family ID), Bank Account, Age Proof, 90-day work certificate from employer/contractor, Passport Photo
apply_where: Labour Department Haryana portal (hrylabour.gov.in) or Antyodaya SARAL Kendra
search_text: Haryana BOCW construction worker registration HBOCWWB labour welfare mason carpenter painter

name: HBOCWWB Maternity Benefit Scheme (Women Construction Workers)
description: Financial assistance to registered women construction workers after childbirth. Covers up to 2 children (extendable to 3 daughters).
amount: ₹36,000 per child (₹30,000 for motherhood + ₹6,000 for nutritious food)
eligibility: Women registered under HBOCWWB with minimum 1 year of regular membership. Haryana domicile. Benefit for up to 2 births (3 if daughters).Registered women worker will not be eligible to avail maternity benefits if husband is already availing paternity benefits from any departments.
documents_needed: HBOCWWB registration card, Aadhar, Bank Account, Child's birth certificate, PPP,Caste certificate,A copy Work slip,Undertaking of husband not claimed paternity benefit.
apply_where: Antyodaya SARAL Portal or Labour Department office
search_text: HBOCWWB maternity benefit 36000 women construction worker childbirth Haryana labour

name: HBOCWWB Paternity Benefit Scheme (Male Construction Workers)
description: Financial assistance to registered male construction workers on birth of child to support wife's care and newborn nutrition.
amount: ₹21,000 (₹15,000 for newborn care + ₹6,000 nutritious food for wife). Up to 2 births (3 if daughters).
eligibility: Male workers registered under HBOCWWB with minimum 1 year membership. Wife should not have claimed maternity benefit from any other employer.
documents_needed: HBOCWWB card, Aadhar, Bank Account, Child's birth certificate, Undertaking that wife hasn't claimed maternity elsewhere
apply_where: Antyodaya SARAL Portal or Labour Department office
search_text: HBOCWWB paternity benefit 21000 male construction worker newborn Haryana

name: HBOCWWB Pension Scheme (Construction Worker Pension)
description: Monthly pension for registered construction workers aged 60+. Must have 3+ years of HBOCWWB membership.
amount: ₹3,250/month after age 60
eligibility: Registered HBOCWWB member with minimum 3 years membership before turning 60. Not receiving any other government pension in Haryana.
documents_needed: HBOCWWB registration card, Aadhar, Age proof, Bank Account, Annual life certificate (November)
apply_where: Antyodaya SARAL Portal or Labour Department office
last_date: Apply after turning 60; life certificate required every November
search_text: HBOCWWB pension 3250 construction worker 60 years labour Haryana

name: HBOCWWB Education Assistance for Children of Construction Workers
description: Annual financial assistance to children of registered construction workers from Class 1 to postgraduation. Additional one-time merit incentive for Class 10 toppers.
amount: Annual: ₹8,000–₹20,000 based on class. One-time merit incentive: ₹21,000–₹51,000 for Class 10 outstanding performance.
eligibility: Children of workers registered under HBOCWWB with minimum 1 year membership. Student must be studying in any school/college in Haryana. Not self-employed or employed.
documents_needed: Parent's HBOCWWB card, Aadhar of child, School/college enrollment certificate, Previous year marksheet, Bank Account of student,Fee receipts
apply_where: Antyodaya SARAL Portal
search_text: HBOCWWB education scholarship children construction worker 8000 20000 class 1 postgraduate Haryana

name: HBOCWWB Tool Kit, Cycle and Sewing Machine Schemes
description: Three small welfare schemes for HBOCWWB-registered construction workers: (1) Tool Kit grant for workers to purchase trade tools; (2) Cycle scheme for commuting; (3) Sewing Machine scheme for women workers.
amount: Tool Kit purchase grant: up to ₹8,000; Cycle: ₹3,000 financial assistance; Sewing Machine: one sewing machine per eligible woman worker
eligibility: All registered HBOCWWB workers with minimum 1 year membership. Sewing machine scheme specifically for women workers.Benefit can be availed once every 5 years.
documents_needed: HBOCWWB registration card, Aadhar, Bank Account, PPP
apply_where: Antyodaya SARAL Portal or Labour Department office
search_text: HBOCWWB tool kit 8000 cycle 3000 sewing machine women construction worker Haryana

name: e-SHRAM Card Registration (National Unorganised Worker Database)
description: Central government registration for all unorganised sector workers (not BOCW/construction only — includes farmers, street vendors, domestic workers, agricultural labourers, rickshaw pullers, street food sellers, migrant workers etc.) on e-SHRAM portal for a Universal Account Number (UAN). Acts as a gateway to all social security schemes.
amount: Free registration; Access to: PM-SYM pension (₹3,000/month at 60); PM-JAY health insurance; PMJJBY life insurance; PMSBY accident insurance (₹2 lakh). One-time accident insurance of ₹2 lakh is also provided directly to e-SHRAM cardholders.
eligibility: Any unorganised sector worker aged 16–59. Should not be a member of EPFO/ESIC/NPS. Not an income tax payer.
documents_needed: Aadhar linked to mobile number, Bank Account
apply_where: e-SHRAM portal online, CSC centre, or Labour Department office
ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment, Government of India
search_text: e-SHRAM card unorganised worker registration UAN asangathit shramik domestic worker agricultural labour migrant

name: Haryana Labour Welfare Board Schemes (Organised/Semi-organised Workers)
description: Welfare schemes by Haryana Labour Welfare Board for workers employed in industrial and commercial establishments with 10+ employees. Benefits include education assistance, cycle, spectacles, sports/cultural competition assistance and marriage grant.
amount: Books/uniform/copies for children: up to ₹4,000/year; Scholarship for children (Class 9 to degree): varies by class; Cycle: ₹3,000; Spectacles: up to ₹1,500; Sports/cultural assistance: varies by level (district/state/national); Kanyadaan (marriage grant) for women workers/daughters: ₹51,000
eligibility: Workers employed in Haryana establishments with 10+ employees contributing to the Haryana Labour Welfare Fund. Must have made contribution to Fund.
documents_needed: Labour Welfare Fund contribution proof, Aadhar, Bank Account, Relevant certificates (birth/school/marriage as applicable)
apply_where: Haryana Labour Welfare Board, Chandigarh or District Labour Office
search_text: Haryana Labour Welfare Board scholarship 4000 cycle 3000 spectacles marriage 51000 industrial worker

name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Parivar Samridhi Yojana (MMPSY)
description: State scheme providing ₹6000/year to every family with income below ₹1.80 lakh or land up to 2 hectares; amount used for insurance, pension, and savings benefits.
amount: ₹6000/year (auto-allocated to insurance & pension schemes)
eligibility: Haryana resident families with annual income up to ₹1.80 lakh or agricultural land up to 2 hectares.
documents_needed: Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP/Family ID), Aadhar, Bank Account
apply_where: Antyodaya Seva Kendra / CSC / Saral Kendra
ministry: Government of Haryana – Chief Minister's Office
search_text: Haryana MMPSY Mukhyamantri Parivar Samridhi 6000 family income

name: Haryana Old Age Samman Allowance
description: Monthly pension of ₹3000 to senior citizens above 60 years who are residents of Haryana with low income.
amount: The current disbursement for eligible recipients is ₹3,000/-, which is slated to be enhanced to 3,200/- in the near future
eligibility: Haryana domicile aged 60+ with annual family income below ₹2 lakh. Must not be receiving any other government pension.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Age Proof, Domicile Certificate, Income Proof, Bank Account, PPP
apply_where: Saral Kendra / Antyodaya Seva Kendra / online SARAL portal
ministry: Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana old age pension 3000 monthly senior citizen 60 years

name: Haryana Widow and Destitute Women Allowance
description: Monthly financial assistance to widows and destitute women who are residents of Haryana.
amount: ₹3200/month
eligibility: Haryana domicile widow/destitute woman with annual income below ₹2 lakh, not drawing any other government pension.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Death Certificate of Husband, Domicile Certificate, Income Proof, Bank Account, PPP
apply_where: Saral Kendra / Antyodaya Seva Kendra
ministry: Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana widow pension 3000 destitute women allowance monthly

name: Haryana Divyang (Disability) Pension
description: Monthly pension for persons with disabilities who are Haryana residents.
amount: ₹3200/month
eligibility: Haryana domicile with at least 60% disability, annual income below ₹2 lakh, and not receiving any other government pension.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Disability Certificate (60%+), Domicile Certificate, Income Proof, Bank Account, PPP
apply_where: Saral Kendra / Antyodaya Seva Kendra
ministry: Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana disability pension divyang 3000 monthly 60 percent

name: Haryana Ladli Scheme
description: Provides financial support of ₹5000 per year for 5 years (deposited in a post office account) for second girl child births in Haryana to promote female birth.
amount: ₹5000/year for 5 years (total ₹25,000 + interest)
eligibility: Haryana resident parents where the second child is a girl. Both girls must be born on or after 30 Aug 2005.
documents_needed: Birth certificate of both girls, Aadhar/Voter ID of parents, Residence proof, PPP
apply_where: Anganwadi / Women & Child Development Office
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana Ladli scheme girl child second daughter 5000 deposit

name: Haryana Kanyadan Scheme (SC/BC Marriage Grant)
description: One-time financial grant for the marriage of daughters belonging to SC, BC, and destitute families in Haryana.
amount: ₹71,000 (SC/ST) or ₹51,000 (BC/Destitute) per marriage
eligibility: Haryana domicile SC/ST/BC/Destitute families. Girl must be 18+ and boy 21+ at time of marriage. Annual income below ₹1 lakh.
documents_needed: Marriage Certificate, Aadhar of bride & groom, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Domicile, PPP
apply_where: Welfare Department / Saral Kendra
ministry: Welfare of SC & BC Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana Kanyadan marriage grant SC BC destitute 71000 51000 daughter

name: Haryana Saksham Yojana
description: Unemployment allowance cum skill development programme for educated unemployed youth of Haryana with a monthly allowance while they get work assignments.
amount: ₹900–₹3000/month allowance + 100 hrs/month work assignment
eligibility: Haryana domicile unemployed youth registered with Employment Exchange. Matric: ₹900, 10+2: ₹1200, Graduate: ₹1500, Post-Graduate: ₹3000.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Educational Certificates, Domicile, Bank Account, Employment Registration, PPP
apply_where: Saksham Portal online / District Employment Exchange
search_text: Haryana Saksham Yojana unemployment allowance educated youth 3000 graduate

name: Haryana Aapki Beti Hamari Beti Scheme
description: Deposit of ₹21,000 in the name of first girl child born in SC/BC families or second girl child in any family in Haryana, to be paid at age 18.
amount: ₹21,000 deposited in LIC at birth (payable at age 18)
eligibility: 1st girl child of SC or BPL families born on/after 22 Jan 2015 OR 2nd girl child of any family (no income limit) born on/after 22 Jan 2015 OR twin/multiple girls born on/after 22 Jan 2015 (₹21,000 per girl child independently).
documents_needed: Birth Certificate, Caste Certificate (for SC/BC), BPL Certificate, Ration Card/Voter ID, PPP
apply_where: Nearest Anganwadi within 1 month of birth
last_date: within one year of the birth of the girl child
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana Aapki Beti Hamari Beti 21000 girl child SC BC deposit LIC

name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Awas Yojana
description: Provides Affordabe House or Land to Built House,financial assistance to weaker sections for construction of houses in Haryana who are not covered under PM Awas Yojana.
amount: Subsidy of ₹1,50,000/- to Purchase Flat or Land.
eligibility: Haryana domicile BPL families not covered under PMAY-G, owning land but without a pucca house.
documents_needed: Aadhar Card, BPL Card, Income Certificate, Mobile Number, PPP, Bank Account
apply_where: Block Development and Panchayat Officer (BDPO) / Gram Panchayat
search_text: Haryana Mukhyamantri Awas Yojana housing 80000 BPL house construction

name: Haryana Piggery Development Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance and subsidy for setting up piggery units to unemployed SC and BPL beneficiaries in Haryana for income generation and self-employment.
amount: 50% subsidy on unit cost for SC applicants (up to ₹50,000), 25% for General. (Federal NLM provides up to 50% for larger units)
eligibility: Permanent resident of Haryana, unemployed SC/BPL persons aged 18-60 interested in pig rearing with adequate space/shed.
documents_needed: Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP ID), Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Cancelled Bank Cheque / Passbook, SC/BPL Certificate, Proof of Shed/Space
apply_where: Antyodaya-SARAL Portal (Online) or Deputy Director's office (Offline)
ministry: Animal Husbandry and Dairying Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana piggery scheme SC BPL subsidy pig rearing income employment MMAPUY

name: Haryana Solar Water Pump Scheme
description: Provides subsidy to farmers for installing solar-powered water pumps for irrigation, reducing dependence on grid electricity.
amount: Up to 75% subsidy (SC/ST/small farmers) or 50% (others) on solar pump cost
eligibility: Haryana farmers with agricultural land in his/her name  and a water source.. The applicant has no electric agricultural connection in his/her name.
documents_needed: Details of micro irrigation system installed, Land Records, Bank Account, PPP
apply_where: HAREDA office / Antyodaya-SARAL Portal
ministry: New and Renewable Energy Department, Haryana
search_text: Haryana solar pump scheme farmer irrigation subsidy 75% renewable energy

name: Haryana Antyodaya Parivar Parivahan Yojana (HAPPY Scheme)
description: Provides free travel up to 1,000 kilometers per year on Haryana Roadways buses (within Haryana only) for each member of Antyodaya families via a personalized NCMC smart card (HAPPY Card).
amount: 1,000 km of free bus travel per year (per family member)
eligibility: Permanent resident of Haryana, belonging to an Antyodaya/BPL family with an active PPP ID and annual family income up to ₹1,00,000. No minimum age — all family members including children are eligible.
card_fee: ₹50 (non-refundable, paid by beneficiary; govt covers ₹109 card cost + ₹79 annual maintenance)
documents_needed: Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP ID), Aadhaar Card (linked to mobile). Income auto-verified via FIDR database — separate income/BPL certificate NOT required.
apply_where: Online via Haryana Transport Portal or collect card from nearest Haryana Roadways Depot after online apply
search_text: Haryana Antyodaya Parivar Parivahan Yojana HAPPY card scheme free bus travel Haryana Roadways transport subsidy

name: Haryana Nirogi Haryana Scheme (Free Health)
description: Free OPD health screening and treatment camps organised across Haryana villages with free medicines for common ailments.
amount: Free health services and medicines
eligibility: All Haryana residents with a verified Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) income up to ₹3 lakh per annum.
documents_needed: Parivar Pehchan Patra (PPP) / Aadhar
apply_where: Government hospitals / CHC / PHC or Nirogi Haryana camps
search_text: Haryana Nirogi health free OPD medicine camp hospital

name: Haryana Pran Vaayu Devta Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for trees that are 75 years old or more, rewarding the tree owner/caretaker for preserving old trees in Haryana.
amount: ₹3000/month per tree (75+ years old)
eligibility: Haryana resident who owns or cares for trees aged 75+ years registered with the scheme,not on forest land
documents_needed: Aadhar, Land Records, Tree Age Certificate from Forest Dept, PPP
apply_where: Divisional Forest Officer / Forest Department
search_text: Haryana Pran Vaayu Devta tree pension 2500 old tree conservation environment

name: Haryana Chirag Scheme (Private School Fees for EWS)
description: Enables students from low-income families to study in private schools under the Haryana government's Chirag scheme with fee reimbursement.
amount: Full tuition fee reimbursement (up to school fee cap)
eligibility: Haryana domicile students from families with annual income below ₹8.0 lakh. For classes 6-12 in government-notified private schools.
documents_needed: Aadhar, Income Certificate, Previous Year Marksheet, PPP
apply_where: Participanting Private School or Block Education Office
search_text: Haryana Chirag scheme private school EWS free education 8.0 lakh income
